title: Include sessions.db in sweech backup/restore
description: Existing `sweech backup` (src/backup.ts) creates AES-256 backups of ~/.sweech/. Extend to include the new sessions.db. Round-trip test: backup → wipe → restore → assert sessions rows survive. Update CHANGELOG and the backup-claude README.

context.text: Filed via /vy-backlog final-pass 2026-05-18. Gap surfaced in 48h-conversation audit.
